Specifications: Volt: 7.7V | Capacity: TYP37Wh MIN35.9Wh | Recycling: up to 500 charge cycles for the life of the battery

HIGH QUALITY COMPONENTS: Our laptop batteries are made from high quality materials and circuit boards to ensure durability and performance. We use only the highest quality batteries that can last up to 500 charge cycles.
Friendly customer service: If you have any problems, questions or concerns, we promise to solve the problem within 24 hours.

Tips: The usage time of a fully charged laptop depends on a number of factors, including battery capacity, usage environment and intensity of use. It also depends on the user's utilisation. If the device is used to play high-resolution videos, play extensive games or for intensive work, the battery life will be considerably shorter. If it is only used for light work such as surfing the Internet, editing documents, etc., the battery life may be longer.
description: Product Description Compatibile con la batteria originale: AP16M5J For Acer Aspire 1 A114-31-Serie For Acer Aspire 3 A314-31 A315-21 A315-51-Serie For Acer Aspire 5 A515-51-Serie For Acer Aspire ES1-523-Serie -Battery won't hold a charge, how to fix it? Remove the battery for a while. Insert the battery and charge it fully using the charger. Disconnect the charger and let the battery discharge to turn it off. Repeat the charging and discharging process at least three times. Please charge the battery when the power is below 20%. If available, connect the AC charger when working on the computer. -Battery suddenly dies at around 20%, how to fix it? Unplug the power cord. Remove the battery. Press and hold the power button for 30 seconds, then release it for 30 seconds, then press and hold it again for another 30 seconds. Plug in the device, replace the battery, and turn on the laptop. Why did my computer not recognize this battery? The reason is the residual power stored in the laptop components, which prevented the battery from functioning properly. Please disconnect the old battery and hold down the power button for 20 seconds. Then connect the new battery. This will consume the residual or flea current, and the battery will function properly after reassembling the laptop. Specifications: Voltage: 7.7V Capacity: 36Wh Compatible with original battery: AP16M5J KT.00205.004 KT00205004 KT.00205.005 KT00205005 2ICP4 / 80/104 Batteries compatible with the following PC models: For Acer Aspire 3 A315-21, Acer Aspire 3 A314-31, Acer Aspire 3 A315-51, Acer Aspire 5 A515-51 For Acer Aspire 1 A114-31-Serie: A114-31-C4HH A114-31-C0GD A114-31-C1HU A114-31-C76W A114-31-C3B7 A114-31-C3E6 A114-31-C44C A114-31-C4TY A114-31-C4ZV A114-31-C5Z2 A114-31-C6FA A114-31-C8PT A114-31-C934 A114-31-P12W A114-31-P9Y1 P52J A114-31-C5GM For Acer Aspire 3 A314-31-Serie: A314-31-C0SG A314-31-COSG A314-31-C12Q A314-31-P2HJ A314-31-C514 A314-31-C4Z5 For Acer Aspire 3 A315-21-Serie: A315-21-95KF A315-21-95KF-US For Acer Aspire 3 A315-51-Serie: A315-51-51SL A315-51-380T A315-51-31GK A315-51-31RD A315-51-51B0 A315-51-580N A315-51-35LM A315-51-582F For Acer Aspire 5 A515-51-Serie: A515-51-75UY A515-51-563W A515-51-50RR A515-51-53TH A515-51-55NB For Acer Aspire ES1-523-Serie: ES1-523-24CW ES1-523-20DG ES1-523-68NA ES1-523-44LU ES1-523-2342 Note: Please check the MODEL and SHAPE of the original battery. Make sure that you have the correct battery. New batteries must be fully charged and discharged two to three times before they are fully functional. Only after two or three complete charge and discharge cycles will a new battery be able to utilise its full charge and service life. Do not leave the computer in a low-power or no-power state for a long period of time, when the remaining power is about 20%, please connect the power supply in time. Charge and discharge the battery once a month, disconnect the power supply, use the battery power up to 20-30% remaining power to keep the battery active. If the computer is not used for a long time, keep the power supply of the computer at about 80% before switching it off, and try to charge the battery from time to time. Do not use the computer in environments that are too cold or too hot. AP19B8K AP19B5K Battery for Acer Aspire 3 A315-56 A315-57 A315-57G A315-58 A3...
